title: Hello, You!
description: Write a script that greets the user with a custom name.
problemStatement:
Create a file named `greet.js`. It should accept one command-line argument (a name) and print `"Hello, [name]!"`. If no argument is provided, it should print `"Hello, stranger!"`.

**Example:**
```
$ node greet.js Alice
Hello, Alice!

$ node greet.js
Hello, stranger!
```
hints: The first two elements of `process.argv` are the Node executable and the script path. Slice them off with `process.argv.slice(2)`.
Check if the sliced array has any elements; if not, use a default name.
